### Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue is referenced above (`Closes #XX`)
- [ ] Acceptance criteria in the issue are all checked off
- [ ] New commands/endpoints have unit tests
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] `missionforge --help` output is accurate (CLI changes only)
- [ ] Mock API updated if contract changed (frontend changes only)
